steps.name: tokens-and-base
steps.summary: tokens.css/base.css v0.2 재구성(라이트+다크, [data-theme]+prefers-color-scheme), theme-init 인라인 스크립트+테스트, alias 정책 옵션 1 채택(잔여 surface는 --leading-*/--container-prose/--color-bg-card)

steps.name: layout-and-nav
steps.summary: BaseLayout v0.2 재설계: 헤더/네비/모바일 메뉴(JS-less <details>)/테마 토글(2-state, 14줄 inline)/skip-link, 기존 canonical·og 회귀 0, audit 0 violations

steps.name: note-and-prose
steps.summary: Note.astro v0.2 재정비(serif h1+mono meta row, prose 컨테이너=68ch), prose.css 신설(h1-h4/단락/링크/코드/blockquote/figure/embed-aside + .heading-anchor + Shiki dual-theme override), core/render/htmlFromMdast.ts에 rehype-slug + rehype-autolink-headings 적용(h2-h4만, behavior=append, 라우팅 슬러그와 분리), astro.config.mjs에 Shiki dual theme + 같은 rehype 미러; canary 0/0(DO_NOT_LEAK_BANANA_6f3c1, CLAUDE_COMMENT_LEAK_77b 모두 dist 0회), audit 0 violations, 47 test files / 437 tests pass
